name: shared-learning emission contains aggregate fp count and aggregate tp count fields
command: mkdir -p community/shared-learning && printf '{"fp":12,"tp":88}\n' > community/shared-learning/counts.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/community/shared-learning/emit.sh" --counts community/shared-learning/counts.json --opt-in --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q '"fp":12' out.txt && grep -q '"tp":88' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
